# Averion Codebase Map (auto-generated, do not hand-edit)

Generated by `generate_codebase_map.py`. Re-run anytime to refresh.
Scanned 86 Python files.

## Tables touched by very few files (potential drift risk)

If a table conceptually overlaps with another table touched by many MORE files, that is a red flag worth investigating - exactly the pattern that caused the live_dca_positions vs positions bug.

## API Endpoints -> Frontend usage

Closes the 'which page calls which endpoint' gap. Match is best-effort string matching, not guaranteed perfect for heavily dynamic URLs - always verify with grep for anything critical.
